expectations.text: The output contains exactly 3 user stories and does not invent UI stories or browser verification.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Personal Access Token Backend",
  "branchName": "personal-access-token-backend",
  "description": "Add storage and server actions for personal access tokens.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add hashed token storage",
      "description": "As a developer, I want hashed personal access token storage with revokedAt defaulting to null so token data remains secure and revocable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Token records store only hashed token values.",
        "revokedAt defaults to null for active tokens.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/personal-access-tokens.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add create-token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a create-token server action that validates label length and returns the plaintext token once so callers can capture it at creation time.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create-token server action validates label length before saving a token.",
        "Successful token creation returns plaintext token once while storing only the hash.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/auth/create-personal-access-token.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 2
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add revoke-token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a revoke-token server action that marks a token revoked without deleting it so token history remains intact.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke-token server action sets revokedAt for targeted token instead of deleting the record.",
        "Revoked tokens can no longer be used after revocation completes.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/auth/revoke-personal-access-token.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 2
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover token storage, create token, and revoke token work.
